reviews.comment:
Baños limpios.
La comida mala. La hamburguesa esta tibia, con un pan seco y la hamburguesa igual, el queso ni calentito como para derretirse. Lo que si estaban bien son las papas. Esas si estaban hechas en el momento.
Tiene un lindo parque para descansar un rato
De la ruta. Si tenes ganas de comer hamburguesas un par de km mas para el norte, esta la cadena de hambuerguesas del dibu.

(Translated by Google)
Clean bathrooms.
The food was bad. The hamburger was lukewarm, with a dry bun and a dry patty; the cheese wasn't even warm enough to melt. The fries were good, though. They were freshly made.
It has a nice park to rest for a while. It's off the main road. If you're in the mood for hamburgers, a couple of kilometers further north there's the Dibu burger chain.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYaXE1WhAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención en el full un chico alto con barba le faltó el respeto a mí abuelo que simplemente les estaba comprando algo , lo sobraba quise interferir para que no lo verdugueé más pero soy menor díganle que agradezca que fue mí abuelo y que no fue mí papá porque lo sacaba del full a piñas muchas gracias 👍🏻

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, the attention in the full room, a tall boy with a beard disrespected my grandfather who was simply buying something from them, it was unnecessary, I wanted to interfere so that I wouldn't harass him anymore but I'm a minor, tell him to be grateful that it was my grandfather and that it wasn't my dad because he took him out of the full house in a hurry, thank you very much 👍🏻
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYM3NudDV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad el paisaje muy hermoso no acorde a la mala atención de los empleados del food que estaban en el  dia de  hoy a las 14 hrs no recuerdo su nombre si  el que atendio con una barba muy desalineada desprolijo  pero si su mala atención, su mala  disposición , lo maleducado que fue con una persona mayor ( mi suegro)  indicando que se sirva el solo ,sobrando y cargando con una soberbia admirable lo bueno de está mala experiencia es no volver en lo  inmediato y quizas nunca mas 😀

(Translated by Google)
The truth is, the scenery was very beautiful, but it didn't match the terrible service from the food staff. Today at 2 PM, I don't remember his name, but I do remember the one who served me with a very unkempt beard and a disheveled appearance. His service was awful, his attitude was terrible, and he was incredibly rude to an elderly person (my father-in-law), telling him to serve himself. He was overbearing and carried on with admirable arrogance. The good thing about this bad experience is that I won't be going back anytime soon, and maybe never again. 😀
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYM29HdnBnRRAB
